languages.text: "Что ж, в этом случае остается лишь помолиться в благодарность за спасение. Да благословит {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g} деяния почтенного семейства Гапрак, свершенные и предстоящие. Уверен, его незримое присутствие не оставит вас".

traits.locale_text: "Что ж, в этом случае остается лишь помолиться в благодарность за спасение. Да благословит {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g} деяния почтенного семейства Гапрак, свершенные и предстоящие. Уверен, его незримое присутствие не оставит вас".

languages.text: "Well, in that case, all that remains is to offer up a prayer of thanks for your survival. May the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} bless the deeds of the most noble House Gaprak, both those already accomplished and those yet to come. I am sure His unseen presence will never leave you."
languages.original_text: "Что ж, в этом случае остается лишь помолиться в благодарность за спасение. Да благословит {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g} деяния почтенного семейства Гапрак, свершенные и предстоящие. Уверен, его незримое присутствие не оставит вас".

traits.locale_text: "Well, in that case, all that remains is to offer up a prayer of thanks for your survival. May the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} bless the deeds of the most noble House Gaprak, both those already accomplished and those yet to come. I am sure His unseen presence will never leave you."

"Well, in that case, all that remains is to offer up a prayer of thanks for your survival. May the God-Emperor bless the deeds of the most noble House Gaprak, both those already accomplished and those yet to come. I am sure His unseen presence will never leave you."

"Well, in that case, all that remains is to offer up a prayer of thanks for your survival. May the God-Emperor bless the deeds of the most noble House Gaprak, both those already accomplished and those yet to come. I am sure His unseen presence will never leave you."

languages.text: «En ese caso, solo podemos ofrecer una oración en agradecimiento por su supervivencia. Que el {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g} bendiga los actos de la nobilísima casa Gaprak, tanto los ya realizados como los que están por venir. Estoy convencido de que Su presencia invisible no les abandonará».
languages.original_text: "Well, in that case, all that remains is to offer up a prayer of thanks for your survival. May the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} bless the deeds of the most noble House Gaprak, both those already accomplished and those yet to come. I am sure His unseen presence will never leave you."

traits.locale_text: «En ese caso, solo podemos ofrecer una oración en agradecimiento por su supervivencia. Que el {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g} bendiga los actos de la nobilísima casa Gaprak, tanto los ya realizados como los que están por venir. Estoy convencido de que Su presencia invisible no les abandonará».

languages.text: “好吧，既然如此，我唯有为您的幸存献上感恩的祈祷了。愿{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}赐福崇高的贾帕克家族——庇佑你们的既往之功，与未竟之业。我深信，祂无形的庇佑必将与你们同在。”
languages.original_text: "Well, in that case, all that remains is to offer up a prayer of thanks for your survival. May the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} bless the deeds of the most noble House Gaprak, both those already accomplished and those yet to come. I am sure His unseen presence will never leave you."

traits.locale_text: “好吧，既然如此，我唯有为您的幸存献上感恩的祈祷了。愿{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}赐福崇高的贾帕克家族——庇佑你们的既往之功，与未竟之业。我深信，祂无形的庇佑必将与你们同在。”

languages.text: « Eh bien, nous pouvons rendre grâce à l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g} pour vous avoir {mf|épargné|épargnée}. Puisse-t-Il bénir les agissements de la très noble maison Gaprak, ceux du passé comme ceux qui restent à venir. Je suis sûr que Sa présence invisible demeurera toujours à vos côtés. »
languages.original_text: "Well, in that case, all that remains is to offer up a prayer of thanks for your survival. May the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} bless the deeds of the most noble House Gaprak, both those already accomplished and those yet to come. I am sure His unseen presence will never leave you."

traits.locale_text: « Eh bien, nous pouvons rendre grâce à l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g} pour vous avoir {mf|épargné|épargnée}. Puisse-t-Il bénir les agissements de la très noble maison Gaprak, ceux du passé comme ceux qui restent à venir. Je suis sûr que Sa présence invisible demeurera toujours à vos côtés. »

languages.text: "Bu durumda geriye sadece hayatta kaldığınız için bir şükür duası etmek kalıyor. {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator{/g}, pek asil Gaprak Hanesi'nin hem daha önce gerçekleştirilmiş hem de henüz gerçekleşmemiş eylemlerini kutsasın. Eminim O'nun görünmez varlığı sizi asla terk etmeyecektir."
languages.original_text: "Well, in that case, all that remains is to offer up a prayer of thanks for your survival. May the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} bless the deeds of the most noble House Gaprak, both those already accomplished and those yet to come. I am sure His unseen presence will never leave you."

traits.locale_text: "Bu durumda geriye sadece hayatta kaldığınız için bir şükür duası etmek kalıyor. {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator{/g}, pek asil Gaprak Hanesi'nin hem daha önce gerçekleştirilmiş hem de henüz gerçekleşmemiş eylemlerini kutsasın. Eminim O'nun görünmez varlığı sizi asla terk etmeyecektir."

languages.text: "Tja, wenn das so ist, müssen wir nur noch ein Dankesgebet für Euer Überleben anstimmen. Möge der {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g} die vergangenen und kommenden Taten des überaus edlen Hauses Gaprak segnen. Ich bin sicher, Seine unsichtbare Präsenz wird stets bei Euch sein."
languages.original_text: "Well, in that case, all that remains is to offer up a prayer of thanks for your survival. May the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} bless the deeds of the most noble House Gaprak, both those already accomplished and those yet to come. I am sure His unseen presence will never leave you."

traits.locale_text: "Tja, wenn das so ist, müssen wir nur noch ein Dankesgebet für Euer Überleben anstimmen. Möge der {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g} die vergangenen und kommenden Taten des überaus edlen Hauses Gaprak segnen. Ich bin sicher, Seine unsichtbare Präsenz wird stets bei Euch sein."

languages.text: 「さて、その場合は、生き延びたことに感謝の祈りを捧げるのみです。最も高貴なギャプラク家の功績、すでに成し遂げられたものとこれから成し遂げられるもの、{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}皇帝{/g}の御加護が降り注ぎます。御姿は見えませんが、決してあなたたちを見捨てないでしょう。」
languages.original_text: "Well, in that case, all that remains is to offer up a prayer of thanks for your survival. May the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} bless the deeds of the most noble House Gaprak, both those already accomplished and those yet to come. I am sure His unseen presence will never leave you."

traits.locale_text: 「さて、その場合は、生き延びたことに感謝の祈りを捧げるのみです。最も高貴なギャプラク家の功績、すでに成し遂げられたものとこれから成し遂げられるもの、{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}皇帝{/g}の御加護が降り注ぎます。御姿は見えませんが、決してあなたたちを見捨てないでしょう。」
